name: Feature request
about: Propose a new CLI capability or improvement

---

## Problem

What user problem does this solve?

## Proposed Command Shape

Example:

```text
ikuai-cli <resource> <action> [args] [flags]
```

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the expected inputs, outputs, and failure cases.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives you already evaluated.

## Additional Context

Links, API references, or related router behavior.
